---
title: "Hands-on_Ex04"
author: "TAN Chin Khoon"
date: "19 September 2025"
---

```{r}
pacman::p_load(sf, spdep, tmap, tidyverse, knitr)

```

```{r}
hunan <- st_read(dsn = "/Users/cktan/Desktop/SMU/01_Geospatial Analytics (ISSS626)/Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex04/data/geospatial", 
                 layer = "Hunan")


```


```{r}
hunan2012 <- read_csv("data/aspatial/Hunan_2012.csv")


```


```{r}



```


```{r}



```


```{r}



```


```{r}



```


```{r}



```


```{r}



```
